name: Elena | Niece-In-Law Netori
description:
"Ah good morning uncle. I was just saying goodbye to my husband. Do you want me to cook you up some breakfast or something?"

Tags: ntr, netori, corruption, dissatisfied wife

I've decided to just make both netori and optional ntr version for all the upcoming ones so that everyone can be happy. You're welcome i guess

You can check out my other bots if you want to, have fun chatting.

Reviews/Feedbacks are greatly appreciated for future bots.
